commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a code-mode worker result normalizer for failed timeout results with QuickJS's raw `interrupted` error and adds regression coverage that preserves guest-thrown `interrupted` errors.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +26. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Partly: source inspection shows current main passes record-shaped worker results through without this normalization, and the PR adds a focused regression for the raw timeout/interrupted shape. I did not establish a live current-main code-mode run that produces that exact worker message.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer labeling and the current failing/pending CI state make this a maintainer-review item rather than an auto-close or repair-lane candidate.

target.title: fix: normalize code mode timeout interrupts
target.body:
## Summary
- Normalize code-mode worker timeout results that surface QuickJS's raw `interrupted` message after the result is already classified as `timeout`.
- Add regression coverage that preserves guest-thrown `interrupted` errors as non-timeout failures.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/code-mode.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Code mode hostile infinite loops still time out, but dependency raw QuickJS `interrupted` timeout messages are normalized to OpenClaw's timeout message.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout, Node via repo Vitest wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/code-mode.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts --reporter=verbose`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: Focused code-mode tests passed after rebase with 2 files and 66 tests passing; full `agents-core` shard passed before rebase with 301 files and 4378 tests passing, 4 skipped; diff check clean; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: The timeout result keeps `code: "timeout"` and normalizes `error` to `code mode timeout exceeded`; guest `Error("interrupted")` remains `internal_error`.
What was not tested: CI rerun was not manually dispatched; no live provider or end-to-end packaged lane was run because this is a local worker/test-path fix.
target.author: romneyda
